summary: Iteration 2 backend regression after requirements.txt cleanup (removed private Emergent litellm URL). All 13 backend checks pass. Backend running via supervisor with trimmed deps (fastapi, uvicorn, python-dotenv, python-multipart, motor, pymongo, pydantic, GitPython). No regressions detected.
passed: POST /api/repos/local {path:/app/backend} -> Repo with last_signature (sha256) and last_synced_at
GET /api/repos/{id}/overview -> frameworks=[FastAPI, MongoDB], stats.python_files=4 (non-zero; matches actual .py count in /app/backend)
GET /api/repos/{id}/models -> 6 Pydantic models (Repo, Annotation, ImportLocalRequest, ImportGithubRequest, AnnotationCreate, WatchToggle); all (name,file,line) tuples unique (no duplicates)
GET /api/repos/{id}/search?q=BaseModel -> multiple hits across parsers.py, models.py, server.py
Annotations CRUD: POST creates (id returned), GET lists it, DELETE returns {deleted:true}, GET list empty after
LIVE WATCH: modified /tmp/watchtest/app.py after enabling watch; within ~8s last_synced_at advanced and last_signature changed; refreshed file content contains new /new route and 'changed' token
POST /api/repos/{id}/refresh -> repo doc returned, last_synced_at updated
DELETE /api/repos/{id} -> {deleted:true}, storage dir removed (verified /app/storage/repos no longer contains ids), annotations list already empty
notes: requirements.txt now has 8 lines only; backend supervisor process RUNNING; test_credentials.md not required (no auth in this app).
